macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Xbox studio shakeups and possible closures dominate industry news
items.summary: Multiple reports point to major turbulence inside Xbox, including senior departures, rumored studio closures, and broader pressure on Microsoft to make Xbox more sustainable. The discussion centered on Compulsion Games, Ninja Theory, and Double Fine, though the reports are still developing.
items.source: Kinda Funny Games Daily / Kotaku / Reuters

items.title: EA pushes harder into in-game advertising
items.summary: EA announced a new plan to place ads directly into gameplay, expanding a long-running push into in-game monetization. The move has drawn attention because it suggests a more aggressive advertising strategy across future EA titles.

items.title: Ubisoft reportedly cancels its 2025 showcase
items.summary: Ubisoft is reportedly skipping its traditional Ubisoft Forward event this summer, which would mark a notable change in its public reveal strategy. The company is said to be breaking from its usual showcase schedule amid wider cost-cutting and restructuring efforts.

items.title: No Man’s Sky receives another major update
items.summary: No Man’s Sky launched a new update that overhauls settlement systems and also includes a free update for the Switch 2 version. The patch continues the game’s long-running post-launch support pattern.

items.title: Nintendo Switch 2 supply concerns emerge in Japan
items.summary: Nintendo confirmed its official stores in Tokyo, Osaka, and Kyoto will not sell the Switch 2 at launch, raising concerns about supply. The decision suggests demand and inventory constraints ahead of release.

items.title: New Nintendo and Switch 2 details surface, including future game support
items.summary: Coverage over the last day highlighted new Switch 2-related information, including a hidden Ocarina of Time description that was later removed and claims about major games coming to the platform. Nintendo-related news remained one of the biggest storylines in gaming.

items.title: Overwatch 2 season update brings a new hero
items.summary: Blizzard’s latest Overwatch 2 seasonal update introduces a new hero who attacks by throwing a bike, adding a notable gameplay change for the current season. The update arrived alongside the new season rollout.

items.title: Dave the Diver heads to mobile this summer
items.summary: Dave the Diver is set to launch on iOS and Android in August, extending the hit game to mobile platforms. The announcement adds another major release to the summer schedule.

items.title: Fable gets a new deep-dive look
items.summary: Microsoft released a new Fable deep-dive video showing off the reboot’s life-sim systems and broader RPG direction. The game remains one of Xbox’s most closely watched upcoming releases.

items.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved preview intensifies anticipation
items.summary: A new look at Halo: Campaign Evolved highlighted the remake ahead of its launch next month. The coverage focused on the campaign content and the game’s return to consoles.

items.title: Big Walk gets an August release date
items.summary: Big Walk, the new game from the creators of Untitled Goose Game, is scheduled to release on August 4. The announcement adds a notable indie title to the upcoming release calendar.

items.title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls revealed as a 4v4 fighting game
items.summary: Arc System Works unveiled Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls, a crossover fighting game planned for 2026. The reveal stood out as one of the most prominent fighting game announcements from recent showcase coverage.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Raw response
items.summary:
I cannot provide real-time technology news, product launches, or company developments from the past 24 hours because I do not have access to live internet data or current news feeds. My knowledge is based on information available up to my last training update, and I cannot retrieve events that have occurred recently.

To find the latest non-AI technology news, product launches, and industry developments, I recommend checking:
- Major tech news websites (e.g., TechCrunch, The Verge, Wired, CNET)
